'''boraraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ytterbian|ytterbian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ytterbian|ytterbian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| boraraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:borarithi|borarithi]] || [[word:borariji|borariji]] || [[word:borarishi|borarishi]] || [[word:borariki|borariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:boraruthuthu|boraruthuthu]] || [[word:borarujuju|borarujuju]] || [[word:borarushushu|borarushushu]] || [[word:borarukuku|borarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:boraruthu|boraruthu]] || [[word:boraruju|boraruju]] || [[word:borarushu|borarushu]] || [[word:boraruku|boraruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:borarufthuf|borarufthuf]] || [[word:borarufjuf|borarufjuf]] || [[word:borarufshuf|borarufshuf]] || [[word:borarufkuf|borarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:borarethe|borarethe]] || [[word:borareje|borareje]] || [[word:borareshe|borareshe]] || [[word:borareke|borareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:borarothotho|borarothotho]] || [[word:borarojojo|borarojojo]] || [[word:boraroshosho|boraroshosho]] || [[word:borarokoko|borarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:borarotho|borarotho]] || [[word:borarojo|borarojo]] || [[word:borarosho|borarosho]] || [[word:boraroko|boraroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:borarofthof|borarofthof]] || [[word:borarofjof|borarofjof]] || [[word:borarofshof|borarofshof]] || [[word:borarofkof|borarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:borar챦fth챦f|borar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fj챦f|borar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fsh챦f|borar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fk챦f|borar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:borar챦fth챦fth챦f|borar챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fj챦fj챦f|borar챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fsh챦fsh챦f|borar챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fk챦fk챦f|borar챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:borar챦fth챦f|borar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fj챦f|borar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fsh챦f|borar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fk챦f|borar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:borar챦fth챦f|borar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fj챦f|borar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fsh챦f|borar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:borar챦fk챦f|borar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:borar챈th챈|borar챈th챈]] || [[word:borar챈j챈|borar챈j챈]] || [[word:borar챈sh챈|borar챈sh챈]] || [[word:borar챈k챈|borar챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:borarathatha|borarathatha]] || [[word:borarajaja|borarajaja]] || [[word:borarashasha|borarashasha]] || [[word:borarakaka|borarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:boraratha|boraratha]] || [[word:boraraja|boraraja]] || [[word:borarasha|borarasha]] || [[word:boraraka|boraraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:borarafthaf|borarafthaf]] || [[word:borarafjaf|borarafjaf]] || [[word:borarafshaf|borarafshaf]] || [[word:borarafkaf|borarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:borarasha|borarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:borarsh챘sha|borarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borarosha|borarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borarmusha|borarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:boraryasha|boraryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborarnksh챘sha|goborarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborarnkrosha|goborarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborarnkmusha|goborarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborarnkyasha|goborarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:borararasha|borararasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:borararsh챘sha|borararsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borararosha|borararosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borararmusha|borararmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:borararyasha|borararyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborararnksh챘sha|goborararnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborararnkrosha|goborararnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborararnkmusha|goborararnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborararnkyasha|goborararnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ber챈rasha|ber챈rasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ber챈rsh챘sha|ber챈rsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ber챈rosha|ber챈rosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ber챈rmusha|ber챈rmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ber챈ryasha|ber챈ryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gober챈rnksh챘sha|gober챈rnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gober챈rnkrosha|gober챈rnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gober챈rnkmusha|gober챈rnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gober챈rnkyasha|gober챈rnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:borfarasha|borfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:borfarsh챘sha|borfarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:borfarosha|borfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:borfarmusha|borfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:borfaryasha|borfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goborfarnksh챘sha|goborfarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goborfarnkrosha|goborfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goborfarnkmusha|goborfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goborfarnkyasha|goborfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
